summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit so Noor returns to the relay room after Chen Wei's death, aligning the chapter's final state with the next chapter's recollection of Day 10 while preserving all existing beats and tone.
edits: Added a brief post-dock return to the relay room before Noor checks Chen Wei's pod, so the inbound-message machinery remains foregrounded after the body count reaches fifteen and the handoff into the hardware decision reads cleanly.
